title: Outbound Accept{Follow} and Reject{Follow} for locked accounts
description:
When admin authorizes a follow request (via CLI command smallhold follow-request accept <id>), generate and enqueue Accept{Follow} activity. When admin rejects, generate and enqueue Reject{Follow}. Both activities target the requester's inbox.

**Agent workflow**: Spawn a research subagent to capture Accept and Reject activity fixtures from mastodon.social and document exact JSON structure. Spawn a parallel subagent to implement the CLI command.

**Test discipline**:
- Test Accept activity JSON structure against mastodon.social fixture
- Test Reject activity JSON structure against mastodon.social fixture
- Test that Accept creates followers row and removes follow_requests row atomically
All fixtures captured from real mastodon.social interactions — never fabricated by the implementation under test. Real in-memory SQLite for DB tests.

**Defensive programming**:
- Accept/Reject must be atomic with the DB update (use a transaction)
- Do not enqueue the activity if the DB update fails
- No .unwrap() outside test code; all errors are Result<T, AppError>
acceptance_criteria: Accept creates followers row, removes follow_request row, enqueues Accept activity atomically; Reject removes row and enqueues Reject activity atomically; DB failure prevents activity enqueue
